name: Surprise Apple Cake
recipeIngredient: Granny Smith apple (peeled, cored, grated, and dried) - 1
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 350°F. Line the bottoms of two 8-inch round cake pans with wax paper.
Grease and flour the pans.
In a medium bowl, combine all dry ingredients: flour, baking powder, cinnamon, baking soda, salt, and nutmeg. Set aside.
In a large bowl, mix together granulated sugar and brown sugar until any lumps are broken up.
Whisk in eggs, then oil, until blended.
Stir in sauerkraut, apple, and nuts. Add the dry ingredient mixture and stir just until moistened.
Spoon the batter into the prepared cake pans.
Bake for about 35 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted into the center comes out clean and the cake pulls away from the sides of the pan.
Let cool in the pans for 10 minutes, then invert onto wire racks to cool completely.
Spread frosting over the cooled cakes. To make the frosting, whip cream cheese until fluffy, gradually adding sugar until smooth. Add heavy cream, orange rind, cinnamon, and vanilla, mixing well.
Makes about 2-1/4 cups. Nutrition facts: 600 calories; 40 grams fat; 60% fat content. Source: Times-Picayune, NOLA. Waldine Van Geffen vghc42a@prodigy.com.
